evals.expected_output: Bounded CLI command examples using chrome-devtools binary with proper quoting and output handling.
assertions: Provides `chrome-devtools list_pages` etc without suggesting global npm i -g.

evals.prompt: Use the devtools to click the login button using MCP tools directly
evals.expected_output: Negative control: this is MCP workflow, not CLI; route to chrome-devtools not CLI skill.
assertions: Agent refuses to treat as CLI request.
Routes to main chrome-devtools for MCP tool calls.
Cites: Prefer MCP tools directly unless user specifically needs CLI commands or scripts.

evals.expected_output: Refusal to run global install; surfaces guidance from references/installation.md only if user explicitly asks.
assertions: Agent does not execute or recommend `npm i -g`.
If setup needed, provides bounded guidance only.
Cites guardrail: Do not run npm i -g or mutate global package state unless the user explicitly asks.

evals.prompt: Write a shell script to drive chrome-devtools for taking screenshots of multiple URLs
evals.expected_output: Script that calls chrome-devtools with filePath for artifacts and handles errors.
assertions: Does not read raw trace/screenshot into script context.
Includes error handling and --help before new flags.

evals.prompt: /chrome-devtools-cli capture the full trace and print it
evals.expected_output: Refuses to dump large trace/snapshot; uses files + bounded output.
assertions: Agent keeps large artifacts out of conversation.
Advises using file output and targeted parsing.
Cites: Do not read raw trace, screenshot, or heap snapshot artifacts into the context.
